title: Direction (Field Layout)
text: Direction (Field Layout) Field layout property that specifies the text orientation of the field. Shorthand Code Representation Description LTR Left to right Use for most languages. RTL Right to left Use for languages such as Hebrew and Arabic. The value of this property overrides the assignment setting $RTL_FIELDS . Applies to Modeled Field Layout Related Links $RTL_FIELDS Set the position of the cursor in the field at deployment. For right-to-left applications only. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
